records.question: Which clubs named BK Slide have a player named Andy Lynch who is a Prop with exactly 5 tries, no goals, at least 20 points, and at most 29 appearances?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN player ON club.club_id = player.club_id
WHERE player.tries = 5.0 AND player.goals = '0' AND player.position = 'Prop' AND player.points >= 20.0 AND player.name = 'Andy Lynch' AND club.name = 'BK Slide' AND player.apps <= 29.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Club_ID
FROM club c
JOIN player p ON c.Club_ID = p.Club_ID
WHERE c.name = 'BK Slide'
AND p.name = 'Andy Lynch'
AND p.Position = 'Prop'
AND p.Tries = 5
AND p.Goals = '0'
AND p.Points >= 20
AND p.Apps <= 29

records.question: Which clubs in England with a total rank of 6 have no more than 0 bronze and at most 3 silver medals, and include a player named Terry Newton who scored at most 9 tries?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN club_rank ON club.club_id = club_rank.club_id
JOIN player ON club.club_id = player.club_id
WHERE club.region = 'England' AND player.tries <= 9.0 AND player.name = 'Terry Newton' AND club_rank.bronze <= 0.0 AND club_rank.silver <= 3.0 AND club_rank.total = 6.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Club_ID
FROM club c
JOIN club_rank cr ON c.Club_ID = cr.Club_ID
JOIN player p ON c.Club_ID = p.Club_ID
WHERE c.Region = 'England'
AND cr.Total = 6
AND cr.Bronze <= 0
AND cr.Silver <= 3
AND p.name = 'Terry Newton'
AND p.Tries <= 9

WHERE player.points = 20.0 AND club_rank.gold <= 11.0 AND club_rank.bronze >= 9.0 AND club_rank.rank <= 1.0 AND club.region = 'UK' AND club_rank.silver >= 11.0 AND club.name = 'BK Slide'

records.question: Which clubs that started in 2001 and are based in Japan have players with at least 20 appearances and at least 188 points?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT club.club_id FROM club
JOIN player ON club.club_id = player.club_id
WHERE club.region = 'Japan' AND club.start_year = '2001' AND player.apps >= 20.0 AND player.points >= 188.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Club_ID
FROM club c
JOIN player p ON c.Club_ID = p.Club_ID
JOIN competition_result cr ON c.Club_ID = cr.Club_ID_1 OR c.Club_ID = cr.Club_ID_2
JOIN competition comp ON cr.Competition_ID = comp.Competition_ID
WHERE c.Start_year = '2001'
AND comp.Country = 'Japan'
AND p.Apps >= 20
AND p.Points >= 188
